sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports shortness of breath with mild exertion, particularly walking up his driveway, and reports palpitations. He also describes feeling extremely low on some days and reports a history of depression and chronic back pain. He has been taking effexor and gabapentin for these conditions. He reports no other acute issues.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals mild wheezes in all lung fields. Chest x-ray shows flattening of the diaphragm, consistent with COPD. Pulmonary function tests confirm COPD.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient is diagnosed with COPD, likely related to smoking history and chronic back pain. His depression is currently stable.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Rescribe combivent inhaler, two puffs twice daily. Order albuterol inhaler, two puffs as needed. Prescribe prednisone, a taper pack. Schedule follow-up in 4 weeks to assess response to treatment and adjust as needed.
